controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the master direction - reserve bank of india (market-makers in otc derivatives) directions, 2021
controls.control_description:
1.1 These Directions shall be called the Master Direction - Reserve Bank of India
(Market-makers in OTC Derivatives) Directions, 2021.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the master direction - reserve bank of india (market-makers in otc derivatives) directions, 2021

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into force on january 03, 2022
controls.control_description: 1.2 These Directions shall come into force on January 03, 2022.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into force on january 03, 2022

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to entities permitted to act as market-maker in otc derivatives in terms of the governing directions
controls.control_description:
1.3 These Directions shall apply to entities permitted to act as market-maker in OTC
derivatives in terms of the Governing Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to entities permitted to act as market-maker in otc derivatives in terms of the governing directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as market-makers for such transactions
controls.control_description:
Definitions
Explanation: Authorised Persons, authorised as such under Section 10(1) of the
Foreign Exchange Management Act, 1999 (42 of 1999), permitted to undertake
foreign exchange derivative transactions with users and other Authorised
Persons, shall be treated as market-makers for such transactions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as market-makers for such transactions

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to it in section 2(20) of the companies act, 2013 (18 of 2013)
controls.control_description:
(i) 'Company' shall have the same meaning as assigned to it in Section 2(20) of
the Companies Act, 2013 (18 of 2013).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to it in section 2(20) of the companies act, 2013 (18 of 2013)

controls.control_objective: To ensure an otc derivative in which one counterparty (protection seller) commits to pay to the other counterparty (protection buyer) in the case of a credit ev
controls.control_description:
(ii) 'Credit default swap' means an OTC derivative in which one counterparty
(protection seller) commits to pay to the other counterparty (protection buyer) in
the case of a credit event with respect to a reference entity and in return, the
protection buyer makes periodic payments (premium) to the protection seller
until the maturity of the contract or the credit event, whichever is earlier.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to an otc derivative in which one counterparty (protection seller) commits to pay to the other counterparty (protection buyer) in the case of a credit ev

controls.control_objective: To ensure an otc derivative which commits two counterparties to exchange streams of interest payments and/or principal amounts in different currencies on specif
controls.control_description:
(iii) 'Currency swap' means an OTC derivative which commits two counterparties to
exchange streams of interest payments and/or principal amounts in different
currencies on specified dates over the duration of the swap at a pre-agreed
exchange rate.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to an otc derivative which commits two counterparties to exchange streams of interest payments and/or principal amounts in different currencies on specif

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to it in section 45u(a) of the act
controls.control_description:
(iv) 'Derivative' shall have the same meaning as assigned to it in Section 45U(a) of
the Act.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to it in section 45u(a) of the act

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to it in paragraph 2(1)(iii) of the electronic trading platforms (reserve bank) directions, 2018 dated october 05, 2
controls.control_description:
(v) 'Electronic Trading Platform (ETP)' shall have the same meaning as assigned
to it in Paragraph 2(1)(iii) of the Electronic Trading Platforms (Reserve Bank)
Directions, 2018 dated October 05, 2018, as amended from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to it in paragraph 2(1)(iii) of the electronic trading platforms (reserve bank) directions, 2018 dated october 05, 2

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to it in section 2(f) of the securities contract regulation act, 1956 (42 of 1956)
controls.control_description:
(vi) 'Exchange' means 'recognised stock exchange' and shall have the same
meaning as assigned to it in Section 2(f) of the Securities Contract Regulation
Act, 1956 (42 of 1956).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to it in section 2(f) of the securities contract regulation act, 1956 (42 of 1956)

controls.control_objective: To ensure an otc derivative involving the exchange of two currencies on a specified date in the future (more than two business days later) at a rate agreed on t
controls.control_description:
(vii) 'Foreign exchange forward' means an OTC derivative involving the exchange
of two currencies on a specified date in the future (more than two business days
later) at a rate agreed on the date of the contract.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to an otc derivative involving the exchange of two currencies on a specified date in the future (more than two business days later) at a rate agreed on t

controls.control_objective: To ensure an otc derivative that gives the buyer the right, but not the obligation, to buy an agreed amount of a certain currency with another currency at a spe
controls.control_description:
(viii) 'Foreign exchange call option (European)' means an OTC derivative that gives
the buyer the right, but not the obligation, to buy an agreed amount of a certain
currency with another currency at a specified exchange rate on a specified date
in the future.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to an otc derivative that gives the buyer the right, but not the obligation, to buy an agreed amount of a certain currency with another currency at a spe

controls.control_objective: To ensure an otc derivative that gives the buyer the right, but not the obligation, to sell an agreed amount of a certain currency for another currency at a spe
controls.control_description:
(ix) 'Foreign exchange put option (European)' means an OTC derivative that gives
the buyer the right, but not the obligation, to sell an agreed amount of a certain
currency for another currency at a specified exchange rate on a specified date
in the future.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to an otc derivative that gives the buyer the right, but not the obligation, to sell an agreed amount of a certain currency for another currency at a spe

controls.control_objective: To ensure an otc derivative involving the actual exchange of two currencies (principal amount only) on a specified date (the short leg) and a reverse exchange o
controls.control_description:
(x) 'Foreign exchange swap' means an OTC derivative involving the actual
exchange of two currencies (principal amount only) on a specified date (the
short leg) and a reverse exchange of the same two currencies at a date further
in the future (the long leg), at rates agreed at the time of the contract.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to an otc derivative involving the actual exchange of two currencies (principal amount only) on a specified date (the short leg) and a reverse exchange o

controls.control_objective: To ensure a cash-settled otc derivative between two counterparties, in which a buyer will pay or receive, on the settlement date, the difference between a pre-d
controls.control_description:
(xi) 'Forward rate agreement' means a cash-settled OTC derivative between two
counterparties, in which a buyer will pay or receive, on the settlement date, the
difference between a pre-determined fixed rate (FRA rate) and a reference
interest rate, applied on a notional principal amount, for a specified forward
period.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a cash-settled otc derivative between two counterparties, in which a buyer will pay or receive, on the settlement date, the difference between a pre-d

controls.control_objective: To ensure a series of interest rate call options (european) (called caplets) in which the buyer of the option receives a payment at the end of each period when
controls.control_description:
(xiii) 'Interest rate cap' means a series of interest rate call options (European) (called
caplets) in which the buyer of the option receives a payment at the end of each
period when the underlying interest rate is above a rate agreed in advance.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a series of interest rate call options (european) (called caplets) in which the buyer of the option receives a payment at the end of each period when

controls.control_objective: To ensure a series of interest rate put options (european) in which the buyer of the option receives a payment at the end of each period when the underlying int
controls.control_description:
(xiv) 'Interest rate floor' means a series of interest rate put options (European) in
which the buyer of the option receives a payment at the end of each period
when the underlying interest rate is below a rate agreed in advance.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a series of interest rate put options (european) in which the buyer of the option receives a payment at the end of each period when the underlying int

controls.control_objective: To ensure an otc derivative that gives the buyer the right, but not the obligation, to buy an interest rate instrument or receive an interest rate on a notional
controls.control_description:
(xv) 'Interest rate call option (European)' means an OTC derivative that gives the
buyer the right, but not the obligation, to buy an interest rate instrument or
receive an interest rate on a notional principal at a pre-determined price/rate on
a specified date in the future.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to an otc derivative that gives the buyer the right, but not the obligation, to buy an interest rate instrument or receive an interest rate on a notional

controls.control_objective: To ensure an otc derivative that gives the buyer the right, but not the obligation, to sell an interest rate instrument or pay an interest rate on a notional pr
controls.control_description:
(xvi) 'Interest rate put option (European)' means an OTC derivative that gives the
buyer the right, but not the obligation, to sell an interest rate instrument or pay
an interest rate on a notional principal at a pre-determined price/rate on a
specified date in the future.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to an otc derivative that gives the buyer the right, but not the obligation, to sell an interest rate instrument or pay an interest rate on a notional pr

controls.control_objective: To ensure an otc derivative in which two counterparties agree to exchange one stream of future interest payments for another, applied on a notional principal am
controls.control_description:
(xvii) 'Interest rate swap' means an OTC derivative in which two counterparties agree
to exchange one stream of future interest payments for another, applied on a
notional principal amount, over a specified period.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to an otc derivative in which two counterparties agree to exchange one stream of future interest payments for another, applied on a notional principal am

controls.control_objective: To ensure an entity which provides prices to users and other market-makers
controls.control_description:
(xviii) 'Market-maker' means an entity which provides prices to users and other
market-makers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to an entity which provides prices to users and other market-makers

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to them in the act
controls.control_description:
2.2 Words and expressions used, but not defined in these Directions, shall have the
same meaning as assigned to them in the Act.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to them in the act

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a good understanding of the nature of the derivative business undertaken by their respective entities and need to demonstrate through their actio
controls.control_description:
3.1 The Board of Directors (or equivalent forum) and senior management of the market-
maker should have a good understanding of the nature of the derivative business
undertaken by their respective entities and need to demonstrate through their actions
that they have a strong commitment to an effective risk management and compliance
environment throughout the organization in respect of the derivative business.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a good understanding of the nature of the derivative business undertaken by their respective entities and need to demonstrate through their actio

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure implementation of:
controls.control_description:
In
particular, the Board of Directors (or equivalent forum) shall ensure implementation
of:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure implementation of:

controls.control_objective: To ensure approve written policies which define the overall framework within which the derivative business shall be conducted, and the related risks managed
controls.control_description:
3.2 Consistent with its general responsibility for corporate governance, the Board of
Directors (or equivalent forum) of the market-maker shall approve written policies
which define the overall framework within which the derivative business shall be
conducted, and the related risks managed.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to approve written policies which define the overall framework within which the derivative business shall be conducted, and the related risks managed

controls.control_objective: To ensure , at a minimum, cover the following aspects:
controls.control_description:
Such framework shall, at a minimum,
cover the following aspects:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , at a minimum, cover the following aspects:

controls.control_objective: To ensure , at a minimum, include the process for evaluation and approval of new products
controls.control_description:
4.1 The policy for the introduction of new OTC derivative products shall, at a minimum,
include the process for evaluation and approval of new products.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , at a minimum, include the process for evaluation and approval of new products

controls.control_objective: To ensure deal only in derivative products permitted in terms of the governing directions
controls.control_description:
4.2.1 Market-makers shall deal only in derivative products permitted in terms of the
Governing Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to deal only in derivative products permitted in terms of the governing directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure deal in derivative products which have cash instrument(s) and/or permitted derivative(s) as components
controls.control_description:
4.2.2 Market-makers may deal in derivative products which have cash instrument(s)
and/or permitted derivative(s) as components.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to deal in derivative products which have cash instrument(s) and/or permitted derivative(s) as components

controls.control_objective: To ensure deal in derivative products containing a derivative instrument as underlying
controls.control_description:
4.2.3 Market-makers shall not deal in derivative products containing a derivative
instrument as underlying, unless specifically permitted in terms of the Governing
Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to deal in derivative products containing a derivative instrument as underlying

controls.control_objective: To ensure deal in derivative products, either directly or on a back- to-back basis, which they cannot price independently
controls.control_description:
4.2.4 Market-makers shall not deal in derivative products, either directly or on a back-
to-back basis, which they cannot price independently.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to deal in derivative products, either directly or on a back- to-back basis, which they cannot price independently

controls.control_objective: To ensure , at a minimum, include an assessment of the following aspects of the product:
controls.control_description:
4.3.1 Due diligence for the introduction of a new product shall, at a minimum, include an
assessment of the following aspects of the product:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , at a minimum, include an assessment of the following aspects of the product:

controls.control_objective: To ensure sign off before approval of new products
controls.control_description:
4.3.2 The Chief Compliance Officer (CCO) and the Chief Risk Officer (CRO) shall sign
off before approval of new products.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to sign off before approval of new products

controls.control_objective: To ensure be approved by the board of directors (or equivalent forum) which shall, inter alia, ensure that all regulations applicable to the product are documen
controls.control_description:
4.3.3 All new products shall be approved by the Board of Directors (or equivalent forum)
which shall, inter alia, ensure that all regulations applicable to the product are
documented and are complied with.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be approved by the board of directors (or equivalent forum) which shall, inter alia, ensure that all regulations applicable to the product are documen

controls.control_objective: To ensure be documented
controls.control_description: 4.4.1 Details of pricing and valuation methodology of the products shall be documented.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be documented

controls.control_objective: To ensure be valued on the basis of the following preferential hierarchy:
controls.control_description: 4.4.2 Products shall be valued on the basis of the following preferential hierarchy:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be valued on the basis of the following preferential hierarchy:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be adequately understood and documented
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be adequately understood and documented

controls.control_objective: To ensure be observable market variables
controls.control_description:
(ii) Inputs underpinning the model shall be observable market variables, where
available;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be observable market variables

controls.control_objective: To ensure be justified, and their calculation methodology shall be documented
controls.control_description:
(iii) If any of the input variables are non-observable/subjective, their use shall be
justified, and their calculation methodology shall be documented;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be justified, and their calculation methodology shall be documented

controls.control_objective: To ensure be periodically validated through independent review and back-testing
controls.control_description:
(iv) The model shall be periodically validated through independent review and
back-testing.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be periodically validated through independent review and back-testing

controls.control_objective: To ensure be classified and offered derivative products in terms of the governing directions
controls.control_description:
5.1.1 User classification: The user shall be classified and offered derivative products
in terms of the Governing Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be classified and offered derivative products in terms of the governing directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made available to the user for providing adequate information to decide if the product will meet its needs and to facilitate comparison with other
controls.control_description:
5.1.2 Product disclosure statement: A product disclosure statement containing
standard information about the product shall be made available to the user for
providing adequate information to decide if the product will meet its needs and to
facilitate comparison with other products.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made available to the user for providing adequate information to decide if the product will meet its needs and to facilitate comparison with other

controls.control_objective: To ensure , at a minimum, contain the following information about the product:
controls.control_description:
This statement shall, at a minimum,
contain the following information about the product:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , at a minimum, contain the following information about the product:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be carried out before undertaking a derivative transaction with the user
controls.control_description:
5.1.3 Due diligence: Due diligence in respect of following aspects shall be carried out
before undertaking a derivative transaction with the user.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be carried out before undertaking a derivative transaction with the user

controls.control_objective: To ensure be consistent with the objective and risk appetite of the user
controls.control_description:
(i) Product suitability: The product offered to the user shall be consistent with
the objective and risk appetite of the user.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be consistent with the objective and risk appetite of the user

controls.control_objective: To ensure be informed of the opinion
controls.control_description:
In case a product is not found
suitable for a user in the assessment of the market-maker, the user shall be
informed of the opinion.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be informed of the opinion

controls.control_objective: To ensure document its analysis and its discussions with the user
controls.control_description:
If the user nonetheless wishes to proceed, the market-
maker shall document its analysis and its discussions with the user.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to document its analysis and its discussions with the user

controls.control_objective: To ensure be escalated to next higher level of authority at the market-maker as also for the user
controls.control_description:
The
approval for such transactions shall be escalated to next higher level of
authority at the market-maker as also for the user.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be escalated to next higher level of authority at the market-maker as also for the user

controls.control_objective: To ensure be offered only to those users who, in the considered assessment of the market-maker:
controls.control_description:
(ii) User appropriateness: A product shall be offered only to those users who, in
the considered assessment of the market-maker:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be offered only to those users who, in the considered assessment of the market-maker:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be provided to the user for each derivative transaction
controls.control_description:
(iii) Risk disclosure statement: A risk disclosure statement shall be provided to
the user for each derivative transaction.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be provided to the user for each derivative transaction

controls.control_objective: To ensure , at a minimum, contain the following information:
controls.control_description:
This statement shall, at a minimum,
contain the following information:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , at a minimum, contain the following information:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be carried out before offering a structured derivative to the user
controls.control_description:
(iv) Structured derivatives: Enhanced due diligence, commensurate with the
complexity of the product, shall be carried out before offering a structured
derivative to the user.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be carried out before offering a structured derivative to the user

controls.control_objective: To ensure be carried out to verify that the persons undertaking the derivative transaction are duly authorised
controls.control_description:
5.1.4 Authority verification: Due diligence shall be carried out to verify that the persons
undertaking the derivative transaction are duly authorised.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be carried out to verify that the persons undertaking the derivative transaction are duly authorised

controls.control_objective: To ensure be undertaken in a fair and transparent manner
controls.control_description: 5.2.1 Transactions shall be undertaken in a fair and transparent manner.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be undertaken in a fair and transparent manner

controls.control_objective: To ensure be undertaken at prevailing market rates
controls.control_description:
5.2.2 Transactions, including roll-over, restructuring and novation, shall be undertaken
at prevailing market rates.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be undertaken at prevailing market rates

controls.control_objective: To ensure be complied with
controls.control_description:
Requirements stipulated in the Governing Directions, in
this regard, shall be complied with.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be complied with

controls.control_objective: To ensure be provided to the user, for each transaction individually or on a consolidated basis, for all transactions undertaken by the user on a particular day
controls.control_description:
5.3.1 A deal confirmation shall be provided to the user, for each transaction individually
or on a consolidated basis, for all transactions undertaken by the user on a
particular day.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be provided to the user, for each transaction individually or on a consolidated basis, for all transactions undertaken by the user on a particular day

controls.control_objective: To ensure be obtained from the user in a manner that ensures its legal enforceability
controls.control_description:
Confirmation of the same shall be obtained from the user in a
manner that ensures its legal enforceability.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be obtained from the user in a manner that ensures its legal enforceability

controls.control_objective: To ensure be provided to the user as per the periodicity mutually agreed between the market-maker and the user, and whenever demanded by the user
controls.control_description:
5.3.2 Mark-to-market value of all the positions shall be provided to the user as per the
periodicity mutually agreed between the market-maker and the user, and
whenever demanded by the user.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be provided to the user as per the periodicity mutually agreed between the market-maker and the user, and whenever demanded by the user

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in writing (including in electronic form)
controls.control_description:
5.4.1 All material information given to the user shall be in writing (including in electronic
form).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in writing (including in electronic form)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be clear and unambiguous in language and presentation
controls.control_description:
5.4.2 Information given to the user shall be clear and unambiguous in language and
presentation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be clear and unambiguous in language and presentation

controls.control_objective: To ensure be prominently presented and clearly explained
controls.control_description:
Warnings and important information shall be prominently presented
and clearly explained.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be prominently presented and clearly explained

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a reasonable basis for expressing the opinion and it shall be unambiguously stated that it is a statement of opinion
controls.control_description:
5.4.3 Wherever an opinion is expressed, there shall be a reasonable basis for
expressing the opinion and it shall be unambiguously stated that it is a statement
of opinion.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a reasonable basis for expressing the opinion and it shall be unambiguously stated that it is a statement of opinion

controls.control_objective: To ensure be adequate and sufficient to help them make an informed decision
controls.control_description:
5.4.4 Information given to the user shall be adequate and sufficient to help them make
an informed decision.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be adequate and sufficient to help them make an informed decision

controls.control_objective: To ensure be identified and risk tolerance levels shall be set
controls.control_description:
6.1 All risks to which the market-maker is exposed on account of its derivative business
shall be identified and risk tolerance levels shall be set.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be identified and risk tolerance levels shall be set

controls.control_objective: To ensure be established to manage these risks
controls.control_description: 6.2 Processes shall be established to manage these risks.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be established to manage these risks

controls.control_objective: To ensure be established to manage these risks
controls.control_description: 6.3 A clear and comprehensive set of limits shall be established to manage these risks.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be established to manage these risks

controls.control_objective: To ensure be conducted
controls.control_description: 6.4 Stress testing of risk positions shall be conducted.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be conducted

controls.control_objective: To ensure be implemented to manage model risk
controls.control_description:
6.5 Effective policies, procedures and controls shall be implemented to manage model
risk.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be implemented to manage model risk

if used, should be subject to documented legal advice.

controls.control_objective: To ensure be recognized and the market-makers should seek to manage the same by undertaking counterparty credit assessment and
controls.control_description:

market-makers should seek to manage the same by undertaking counterparty credit
assessment and, wherever permitted, by exchanging appropriate collateral with the

controls.control_objective: To ensure be established to apply internal controls at various stages in the workflow of processing and monitoring transactions
controls.control_description:
7.1 Policies and procedures shall be established to apply internal controls at various
stages in the workflow of processing and monitoring transactions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be established to apply internal controls at various stages in the workflow of processing and monitoring transactions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be clear separation, both functionally and physically, between the front office, which is responsible for the conduct of trading operations, and the b
controls.control_description:
7.2 There shall be clear separation, both functionally and physically, between the front
office, which is responsible for the conduct of trading operations, and the back office,
which is responsible for processing the resultant trades.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be clear separation, both functionally and physically, between the front office, which is responsible for the conduct of trading operations, and the b

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subjected to internal audit to review the adequacy and test the effectiveness of the risk management system and internal controls
controls.control_description:
8.1 Derivative business shall be subjected to internal audit to review the adequacy and
test the effectiveness of the risk management system and internal controls.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subjected to internal audit to review the adequacy and test the effectiveness of the risk management system and internal controls

controls.control_objective: To ensure , at a minimum:
controls.control_description:
The audit
shall, at a minimum:

controls.control_objective: To ensure test derivative valuation reports for accuracy
controls.control_description:
Auditors should test
derivative valuation reports for accuracy;

controls.control_objective: To ensure be conducted by qualified professionals, who are independent of the business line being audited
controls.control_description:
8.2 Internal audit shall be conducted by qualified professionals, who are independent of
the business line being audited.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be conducted by qualified professionals, who are independent of the business line being audited

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported to the audit committee of the board of directors (or equivalent forum)
controls.control_description:
8.3 Failure of management to implement the recommendations of the internal auditor
within an agreed timeframe shall be reported to the Audit Committee of the Board of
Directors (or equivalent forum).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported to the audit committee of the board of directors (or equivalent forum)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be preserved up to the existing statutory retention periods
controls.control_description:
9.1 All business, control and monitoring records should be preserved up to the existing
statutory retention periods.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be preserved up to the existing statutory retention periods

controls.control_objective: To ensure be preserved as per the internal policy of the market-maker subject to the condition that they are preserved for at least two years after the life of
controls.control_description:
Wherever statutory retention periods are not stipulated, such
records shall be preserved as per the internal policy of the market-maker subject to the
condition that they are preserved for at least two years after the life of the
product/transaction.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be preserved as per the internal policy of the market-maker subject to the condition that they are preserved for at least two years after the life of

controls.control_objective: To ensure be done and preserved according to the it policy of the market-maker
controls.control_description:
Back up of crucial information and data shall be done and preserved
according to the IT policy of the market-maker.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be done and preserved according to the it policy of the market-maker

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to apply to derivative transactions undertaken in accordance with the said directions, till their expiry
controls.control_description:
10.2 Directions contained in the circulars listed under para 10.1 shall continue to apply to
derivative transactions undertaken in accordance with the said directions, till their expiry.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to apply to derivative transactions undertaken in accordance with the said directions, till their expiry
